body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"work substantially delivered by closed sibling ddx-06f820f4 — potential duplicate: Both named AC tests (TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject and TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode) already exist at cli/cmd/install_global_test.go:391 and :423, written as part of now-closed sibling bead ddx-06f820f4. The implementation (performGlobalUpdate at update.go:300, --global routing at update.go:65-67, ddxroot.GlobalDir() call at update.go:337) is fully in place. Dependency ddx-06cbaa90 is closed. An agent claiming this bead would either do nothing useful or produce duplicate tests. One gap survives: TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode does not seed a global sentinel or assert the global dir is untouched for the no-flag path — the positive case is covered but the negative is not. Operator must decide: close as already-delivered by ddx-06f820f4, or narrow the bead to just the missing negative assertion.","fingerprint":"78fcd34e23f0c991335ce90c4e8b457acf6da4823be0c5125b974d374259fffa","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"78fcd34e23f0c991335ce90c4e8b457acf6da4823be0c5125b974d374259fffa"}
